description: In the WordPress admin panel, modify the existing media attachments 'Massive Landscape' and 'Sideways Portrait' using the native image editor. Scale 'Massive Landscape' to a width of 1200 pixels. Rotate 'Sideways Portrait' 90 degrees clockwise and set its Alternative Text to 'Professional headshot restored'. Create and publish a new post titled 'Meet the Team' that includes both modified images. Do not upload new images or edit them externally; you must modify the existing media files.
